name: GoogleSignIn

unions.name: Attribute
unions.comment: Like a normal HTML Attribute, but these can only apply to Google Sign in Buttons

unions.name: ClientId
unions.comment: What Google uses to keep track of your application

aliases.name: Profile
aliases.comment:
All of the important information Google stores about a user.
The `idToken` is what should be sent back to your server for authentication purposes.
The `email` field is only present if your clientId has the right scopes.
aliases.type: { id : String.String, idToken : String.String, name : String.String, givenName : String.String, familyName : String.String, imageUrl : String.String, email : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: idAttr
values.comment: Supply the ClientId for the application this button should sign in to.

values.name: onSignIn
values.comment: Respond to when the user completes signing in through Google.

values.name: styledView
values.comment:
Yields a Google sign in button
intended for use with rtfeldman/elm-css

values.name: view
values.comment:
Yields a Google sign in button
intended for use with elm/html
